tasks.title: Set Up Project Structure
tasks.description: Initialize the Android project with the necessary dependencies and configurations.
tasks.details: Create a new Android project in Android Studio using Kotlin. Set up Gradle dependencies for Supabase, Firebase Cloud Messaging, and any other required libraries. Configure the MVVM architecture and Repository pattern.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify project builds successfully and runs on an emulator.

subtasks.title: Create New Android Project
subtasks.description: Initialize a new Android project in Android Studio using Kotlin as the primary language.
subtasks.details: Open Android Studio and select 'New Project'. Choose 'Empty Activity', set the project name, package name, and select Kotlin as the language. Configure minimum SDK and finish the setup.

subtasks.title: Set Up Gradle Dependencies
subtasks.description: Add necessary dependencies for Supabase, Firebase Cloud Messaging, and other libraries in the Gradle files.
subtasks.details: Open the build.gradle (app) file and add dependencies for Supabase, Firebase Cloud Messaging, and any other required libraries. Sync the project after adding dependencies.

subtasks.title: Configure MVVM Architecture
subtasks.description: Set up the MVVM architecture for the project to ensure a clean separation of concerns.
subtasks.details: Create necessary packages for ViewModels, Models, and Repositories. Implement the basic structure of MVVM by creating a sample ViewModel and linking it to an Activity or Fragment.

subtasks.title: Implement Repository Pattern
subtasks.description: Establish the Repository pattern to manage data operations and provide a clean API for data access.
subtasks.details: Create a Repository class that will handle data operations, including fetching data from Supabase. Ensure it interacts with the ViewModel appropriately.

subtasks.title: Verify Project Build and Run
subtasks.description: Ensure that the project builds successfully and runs on an emulator without errors.
subtasks.details: Run the project on an Android emulator to verify that it builds correctly. Check for any build errors and resolve them before proceeding.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the build process and run the app on an emulator to confirm functionality.

tasks.title: Implement User Authentication
tasks.description: Integrate Supabase Auth for user sign-up and login functionalities.
tasks.details: Use Supabase Auth to allow users to sign up via email or Google. Implement UI for authentication and handle user sessions.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user registration and login flows, ensuring users can access their accounts.

subtasks.title: Set Up Supabase Project
subtasks.description: Create a new Supabase project and configure authentication settings.
subtasks.details: Sign up for Supabase, create a new project, and enable email and Google authentication in the settings. Document the project URL and API keys for integration.

subtasks.title: Implement Email Sign-Up Functionality
subtasks.description: Develop the user interface and backend logic for email sign-up using Supabase Auth.
subtasks.details: Create a sign-up form in the UI that captures user email and password. Use Supabase's API to handle user registration and provide feedback on success or failure.

subtasks.title: Implement Google Sign-In Functionality
subtasks.description: Integrate Google sign-in option for user authentication using Supabase.
subtasks.details: Add a button for Google sign-in on the authentication UI. Use Supabase's Google OAuth integration to authenticate users and manage sessions accordingly.

subtasks.title: Handle User Sessions
subtasks.description: Implement session management to keep users logged in and manage their sessions.
subtasks.details: Use Supabase's session management features to track user login status. Ensure that users remain logged in across sessions and can log out successfully.

subtasks.title: Test Authentication Flows
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of the user authentication flows for both email and Google sign-in.
subtasks.details: Create test cases for user registration, login, and session management. Ensure that all flows work as expected and handle edge cases like incorrect credentials.

tasks.title: Create Task Model and Database Schema
tasks.description: Define the data model for tasks and set up the PostgreSQL database schema in Supabase.
tasks.details: Create a Task model with fields for title, due date, difficulty, and status. Set up the corresponding table in Supabase.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that tasks can be created, read, updated, and deleted in the database.

subtasks.title: Define Task Model Fields
subtasks.description: Identify and define the fields required for the Task model, including title, due date, difficulty, and status.
subtasks.details: Create a detailed specification for the Task model, ensuring all necessary fields are included and properly typed for the PostgreSQL database.

subtasks.title: Create PostgreSQL Table Schema
subtasks.description: Set up the PostgreSQL table schema in Supabase based on the defined Task model.
subtasks.details: Use Supabase SQL editor to create a table named 'tasks' with columns for title, due date, difficulty, and status, ensuring correct data types and constraints are applied.

subtasks.title: Implement CRUD Operations
subtasks.description: Develop the Create, Read, Update, and Delete (CRUD) operations for the Task model in Supabase.
subtasks.details: Write functions to handle CRUD operations for the Task model, ensuring they interact correctly with the Supabase database and handle errors appropriately.

subtasks.title: Test Database Functionality
subtasks.description: Verify that the CRUD operations for the Task model work as intended in the Supabase database.
subtasks.details: Conduct tests to ensure that tasks can be created, read, updated, and deleted successfully, and validate the data integrity in the database.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform unit tests for each CRUD operation and integration tests to ensure overall functionality.

subtasks.title: Document Task Model and Schema
subtasks.description: Create documentation for the Task model and its corresponding database schema.
subtasks.details: Write comprehensive documentation that outlines the Task model fields, database schema, and usage examples for future reference and development.

tasks.title: Develop Smart Prioritization Algorithm
tasks.description: Implement the algorithm to rank tasks based on due date, difficulty, and past performance.
tasks.details: Create a function that takes a list of tasks and ranks them based on the specified criteria. Ensure it can dynamically update rankings.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit test the ranking function with various task scenarios to ensure correct prioritization.

subtasks.title: Define Task Ranking Criteria
subtasks.description: Establish the criteria for ranking tasks based on due date, difficulty, and past performance.
subtasks.details: Create a document outlining how each criterion will be measured and weighted in the ranking algorithm. Include examples of tasks to illustrate the criteria.

subtasks.title: Implement Ranking Function
subtasks.description: Develop the core function that will rank tasks according to the defined criteria.
subtasks.details: Write a function that accepts a list of tasks and returns them sorted based on the established ranking criteria. Ensure the function is efficient and can handle large datasets.

subtasks.title: Integrate Dynamic Updates
subtasks.description: Modify the ranking function to allow for dynamic updates as task attributes change.
subtasks.details: Implement a mechanism that re-evaluates and updates the task rankings whenever a task's due date, difficulty, or past performance is modified. Ensure this is efficient and does not require a full re-evaluation of all tasks.

subtasks.title: Unit Test Ranking Function
subtasks.description: Create unit tests for the ranking function to validate its accuracy and performance.
subtasks.details: Develop a suite of unit tests that cover various scenarios, including edge cases, to ensure the ranking function behaves as expected. Use a testing framework suitable for the programming language being used.

subtasks.title: Document Algorithm Usage
subtasks.description: Write documentation on how to use the smart prioritization algorithm within the project.
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive documentation that explains how to integrate and use the ranking function in the project. Include examples and potential use cases to guide developers.

tasks.title: Build Home Screen UI
tasks.description: Design and implement the home screen to display the top 3 priority tasks.
tasks.details: Create a minimalist UI that shows the top 3 tasks with their titles, due dates, and progress bars. Use the ranking algorithm to populate this view.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct user testing to ensure the UI is intuitive and displays the correct tasks.

subtasks.title: Design Home Screen Layout
subtasks.description: Create a wireframe and design for the home screen layout that displays the top 3 priority tasks.
subtasks.details: Use design tools like Figma or Sketch to create a minimalist layout that includes sections for task titles, due dates, and progress bars.

subtasks.title: Implement UI Components
subtasks.description: Develop the UI components for displaying task titles, due dates, and progress bars.
subtasks.details: Utilize a UI framework like React or Vue.js to build components that will render the task information dynamically.

subtasks.title: Integrate Ranking Algorithm
subtasks.description: Implement the ranking algorithm to determine the top 3 priority tasks to display on the home screen.
subtasks.details: Ensure the algorithm fetches tasks from the database and ranks them based on priority and due dates before rendering.

subtasks.title: Add Progress Bar Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement progress bars for each task to visually represent their completion status.
subtasks.details: Use a library or custom code to create progress bars that update based on task completion percentages.

subtasks.title: Conduct User Testing
subtasks.description: Perform user testing to evaluate the usability and functionality of the home screen UI.
subtasks.details: Gather feedback from users to ensure the UI is intuitive and correctly displays the top 3 tasks as intended.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct usability testing sessions and collect user feedback.

tasks.title: Implement AI-Guided Task Breakdown
tasks.description: Integrate AI functionality to generate a roadmap for complex tasks.
tasks.details: Use Google Gemini API or OpenAI GPT-4o to generate sub-tasks based on user input. Implement the API call and handle responses.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the AI integration with various task inputs and ensure the generated roadmaps are logical and editable.

subtasks.title: Research AI APIs for Task Breakdown
subtasks.description: Investigate Google Gemini API and OpenAI GPT-4o to determine the best fit for generating subtasks.
subtasks.details: Analyze the documentation and capabilities of both Google Gemini API and OpenAI GPT-4o to understand their strengths and limitations for task breakdown.

subtasks.title: Implement API Call for AI Integration
subtasks.description: Develop the functionality to call the selected AI API for generating subtasks based on user input.
subtasks.details: Create a function that makes an API request to the chosen AI service, sending user input and handling the response appropriately.

subtasks.title: Handle API Responses and Generate Subtasks
subtasks.description: Process the API responses to extract generated subtasks and format them for the application.
subtasks.details: Implement logic to parse the API response, extract relevant subtask information, and create subtask objects in the application.

subtasks.title: Integrate Subtask Generation into User Interface
subtasks.description: Update the user interface to allow users to input tasks and view generated subtasks from the AI.
subtasks.details: Modify the UI components to include input fields for task descriptions and a display area for the generated subtasks, ensuring a smooth user experience.

subtasks.title: Test AI Integration and Subtask Logic
subtasks.description: Conduct tests to ensure the AI integration works correctly and the generated subtasks are logical and editable.
subtasks.details: Create test cases that cover various user inputs and validate that the generated subtasks meet the expected criteria for logic and editability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the AI integration with various task inputs and ensure the generated roadmaps are logical and editable.

tasks.title: Create Task Breakdown UI
tasks.description: Design the UI for displaying and editing the generated sub-tasks.
tasks.details: Implement a UI that allows users to view, edit, reorder, and delete sub-tasks. Ensure it integrates with the main task.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct usability testing to ensure users can easily manipulate sub-tasks.

subtasks.title: Design UI Wireframes
subtasks.description: Create wireframes for the task breakdown UI to visualize layout and functionality.
subtasks.details: Use design tools like Figma or Sketch to create wireframes that outline the user interface for viewing, editing, reordering, and deleting sub-tasks. Ensure the design is user-friendly and aligns with the overall application style.

subtasks.title: Develop Task List Component
subtasks.description: Implement the component that displays the list of sub-tasks in the UI.
subtasks.details: Create a reusable component in the chosen framework (e.g., React, Angular) that fetches and displays the list of sub-tasks. Ensure it supports dynamic updates when sub-tasks are added or removed.

subtasks.title: Implement Edit and Delete Functionality
subtasks.description: Add functionality to edit and delete sub-tasks from the UI.
subtasks.details: Integrate edit and delete buttons for each sub-task in the task list component. Ensure that editing updates the UI in real-time and that deleted tasks are removed from the display immediately.

subtasks.title: Add Reordering Feature
subtasks.description: Implement drag-and-drop functionality to reorder sub-tasks in the UI.
subtasks.details: Utilize a library or framework feature that supports drag-and-drop to allow users to reorder sub-tasks. Ensure that the new order is saved and reflected in the database.

subtasks.title: Conduct Usability Testing
subtasks.description: Test the UI with users to ensure it meets their needs and is easy to use.
subtasks.details: Organize a usability testing session with potential users to gather feedback on the task breakdown UI. Focus on the ease of use for viewing, editing, reordering, and deleting sub-tasks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Collect user feedback and observe interactions to identify any usability issues.

tasks.title: Develop Visual Progress Dashboard
tasks.description: Create a dashboard that visually represents task progress and workload.
tasks.details: Implement a dashboard that shows today's tasks with progress bars and a workload overview. Ensure real-time updates as tasks are completed.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the dashboard for accuracy in displaying task progress and workload.

subtasks.title: Design Dashboard Layout
subtasks.description: Create a wireframe for the visual progress dashboard layout.
subtasks.details: Use design tools like Figma or Sketch to create a wireframe that outlines the layout of the dashboard, including sections for today's tasks, progress bars, and workload overview.

subtasks.title: Implement Task Progress Bars
subtasks.description: Develop the functionality to display progress bars for each task on the dashboard.
subtasks.details: Use a front-end framework like React or Vue.js to create progress bars that visually represent the completion percentage of each task based on their status.

subtasks.title: Create Workload Overview Section
subtasks.description: Build a section that summarizes the overall workload on the dashboard.
subtasks.details: Implement a component that aggregates the number of tasks and their statuses to provide a quick overview of the workload, using charts or simple statistics.

subtasks.title: Integrate Real-Time Updates
subtasks.description: Ensure the dashboard updates in real-time as tasks are completed.
subtasks.details: Utilize WebSockets or a similar technology to push updates to the dashboard whenever a task's status changes, ensuring users see the most current information.

subtasks.title: Test Dashboard Functionality
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of the dashboard to ensure all features work as intended.
subtasks.details: Perform unit tests and user acceptance testing to verify that the dashboard displays task progress accurately and updates in real-time as tasks are completed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the dashboard for accuracy in displaying task progress and workload.

tasks.title: Implement Smart Notifications
tasks.description: Create a notification system for task reminders and alerts.
tasks.details: Use Firebase Cloud Messaging to send notifications for task reminders based on user-defined settings and task deadlines.
tasks.testStrategy: Test notification delivery for various scenarios and ensure they are timely and relevant.

subtasks.title: Set Up Firebase Cloud Messaging
subtasks.description: Configure Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for the project to enable push notifications.
subtasks.details: Create a Firebase project and enable Cloud Messaging. Obtain the necessary API keys and configure them in the application settings.

subtasks.title: Implement Notification Scheduling Logic
subtasks.description: Develop the logic to schedule notifications based on user-defined settings and task deadlines.
subtasks.details: Create a function that checks user settings and schedules notifications accordingly. Ensure it can handle multiple tasks and deadlines.

subtasks.title: Create Notification Payload Structure
subtasks.description: Define the structure of the notification payload to be sent via FCM.
subtasks.details: Design the JSON structure for notifications, including title, body, and any additional data needed for the app.

subtasks.title: Integrate Notification Sending Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement the function to send notifications using FCM when tasks are due.
subtasks.details: Use the FCM API to send notifications based on the scheduled tasks. Ensure error handling is in place for failed notifications.

subtasks.title: Test Notification Delivery and Timing
subtasks.description: Conduct tests to ensure notifications are delivered correctly and on time.
subtasks.details: Create test cases for various scenarios, including different user settings and task deadlines. Verify that notifications are timely and relevant.

tasks.title: Integrate Gamification Features
tasks.description: Develop a system for tracking user progress and rewarding achievements.
tasks.details: Implement a daily streak counter, achievement badges, and CampusCoins system. Ensure rewards are meaningful and tied to task completion.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the gamification features to ensure they trigger correctly and provide appropriate rewards.

subtasks.title: Implement Daily Streak Counter
subtasks.description: Create a system to track and display the user's daily streak of completed tasks.
subtasks.details: Develop a function that checks the completion of tasks daily and increments the streak counter. Store the streak data in the database and ensure it resets after a missed day.

subtasks.title: Design Achievement Badges
subtasks.description: Create a set of achievement badges that users can earn based on their progress and milestones.
subtasks.details: Design various badges that represent different achievements. Implement logic to award badges when users reach specific milestones, such as completing a certain number of tasks.

subtasks.title: Develop CampusCoins System
subtasks.description: Implement a virtual currency system (CampusCoins) that rewards users for completing tasks and achieving milestones.
subtasks.details: Create a currency system where users earn CampusCoins for task completions and achievements. Ensure that the coins can be displayed in the user profile and can be redeemed for rewards.

subtasks.title: Integrate Reward Mechanism
subtasks.description: Link the rewards system to task completion and user achievements to ensure meaningful rewards.
subtasks.details: Develop a mechanism that triggers rewards when users complete tasks or earn badges. Ensure that the rewards are meaningful and encourage continued engagement.

subtasks.title: Test Gamification Features
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of the gamification features to ensure they function correctly and provide appropriate rewards.
subtasks.details: Create test cases to verify that the daily streak counter, achievement badges, and CampusCoins system work as intended. Ensure that rewards are triggered correctly based on user actions.

tasks.title: Conduct User Testing and Feedback Collection
tasks.description: Gather user feedback on the app's functionality and usability.
tasks.details: Conduct user testing sessions to gather feedback on the app's features and usability. Use this feedback to make necessary adjustments.
tasks.testStrategy: Analyze user feedback and implement changes based on common pain points and suggestions.

subtasks.title: Define User Testing Objectives
subtasks.description: Establish clear objectives for what the user testing sessions aim to achieve.
subtasks.details: Identify key areas of the app that need feedback, such as usability, functionality, and user experience. Document these objectives to guide the testing sessions.

subtasks.title: Recruit Test Participants
subtasks.description: Find and recruit users who will participate in the testing sessions.
subtasks.details: Create a list of criteria for selecting participants, such as demographics and familiarity with similar apps. Use social media and user forums to recruit a diverse group of testers.

subtasks.title: Conduct User Testing Sessions
subtasks.description: Facilitate sessions where users interact with the app and provide feedback.
subtasks.details: Schedule and conduct testing sessions, ensuring participants are comfortable and understand the tasks they need to complete. Record sessions for later analysis.

subtasks.title: Analyze User Feedback
subtasks.description: Review and analyze the feedback collected from user testing sessions.
subtasks.details: Compile feedback into a report, categorizing comments by theme and identifying common pain points. Use this analysis to inform necessary adjustments to the app.

subtasks.title: Implement Changes Based on Feedback
subtasks.description: Make necessary adjustments to the app based on user feedback.
subtasks.details: Prioritize changes based on user feedback and implement them in the app. Ensure that adjustments improve usability and functionality as intended.

tasks.title: Prepare for Launch
tasks.description: Finalize the app for deployment and prepare marketing materials.
tasks.details: Ensure all features are functioning as intended, prepare app store listings, and create promotional materials for launch.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct a final review of the app and marketing materials to ensure readiness for launch.

subtasks.title: Conduct Final Feature Review
subtasks.description: Review all app features to ensure they are functioning as intended before launch.
subtasks.details: Test each feature of the app thoroughly to confirm that they work correctly and meet the specifications outlined in the project requirements.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform manual testing and automated tests to validate feature functionality.

subtasks.title: Prepare App Store Listings
subtasks.description: Create and finalize app store listings for both iOS and Android platforms.
subtasks.details: Gather all necessary information including app descriptions, screenshots, and promotional videos. Ensure compliance with app store guidelines.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review listings for accuracy and completeness before submission.

subtasks.title: Create Promotional Materials
subtasks.description: Design and produce marketing materials for the app launch.
subtasks.details: Develop graphics, social media posts, and other promotional content to generate interest in the app prior to launch.
subtasks.testStrategy: Gather feedback on promotional materials from team members and revise as necessary.

subtasks.title: Finalize Launch Strategy
subtasks.description: Develop a comprehensive strategy for the app launch including timelines and channels.
subtasks.details: Outline the launch timeline, identify key marketing channels, and assign responsibilities to team members for execution.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review the launch strategy with stakeholders to ensure alignment and readiness.

subtasks.title: Conduct Final Review Meeting
subtasks.description: Hold a meeting with the team to review all preparations for the app launch.
subtasks.details: Discuss the status of all subtasks, address any last-minute issues, and confirm that everyone is prepared for the launch.
subtasks.testStrategy: Document meeting outcomes and action items to ensure accountability.
